title: Mascarpone Delight Mousse
description: A light and airy Italian dessert made with mascarpone cheese, perfect for warm weather. Simple to prepare and impressive to serve.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whip the mascarpone cheese until it becomes light and fluffy.
Gradually add the granulated sugar and continue whipping until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Add the egg whites to the mascarpone mixture and whip until combined.
Stir in the monsoon delight fruit preserves and vanilla extract.
Spoon the mousse into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until set.
Serve chilled and garnished with additional monsoon delight fruit preserves, if desired.
